purpose: Matrix Reprogrammed live intelligence source lanes for public-record updates, Epstein timeline mapping, court records, email releases, declassified-file discovery, elite-control developments, war/conflict routes, financial power, surveillance, and book/video conversion paths.
rules: Prefer primary sources, court records, official releases, archives, and dated reporting.
Do not treat a news mention as proof of wrongdoing.
Every item must keep a source URL, source label, date, lane, and reader route.
Every update should connect to evidence, video, opt-in, offer, and book/store routes where relevant.
Epstein updates should be cross-checked against the timeline map, people tracker, evidence ladder, actual files cockpit, and network architecture matrix.
If a feed fails, preserve the page and show the last known source set rather than breaking the build.

lanes.title: Epstein Files, Timeline And Court Records
lanes.description: Public-record updates, court filings, document releases, email-release reporting, archive mirrors, oversight moves, timeline changes, people/entity tracking, and association-boundary briefings.

lanes.title: Declassified Files And Public Archives
lanes.description: Newly released files, FOIA material, archive releases, historical intelligence documents, and public-record research routes.

lanes.title: Elite Control Structure
lanes.description: Institutional power, surveillance, central banking, policy networks, information control, NGOs, intelligence influence, and elite overlap mapping.

lanes.title: War Machine And Intelligence State
lanes.description: War, contractors, intelligence agencies, oversight failures, conflict narratives, military technology, and public-record power routes.

lanes.title: Crime State Overlap
lanes.description: Organized crime, money laundering, trafficking routes, cartel logistics, state protection, and public-record criminal networks.
